nasb.text: Of the sons of Beriah: of Heber, the family of the Heberites; of Malchiel, the family of the Malchielites.

esv.text: Of the sons of Beriah: of Heber, the clan of the Heberites; of Malchiel, the clan of the Malchielites.

cnv.text: 比利亞的子孫，屬希別的，有希別家族；屬瑪結的，有瑪結家族。

ccb.text: 比利亚的子孙有希别族和玛结族。
